{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 75, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Incomplete bolt pattern on flanged joint", "Flange not fully bolted per required pattern", "Potential for uneven gasket compression and leakage"], "actions": ["Install all required bolts per ASME PCC-1 Appendix E bolting sequence", "Verify bolt size, grade, and torque per project specifications and B16.5", "Inspect gasket condition and replace if damaged", "Retorque in proper cross-pattern sequence", "Hold pressure test until corrected"], "rationale": "An incomplete bolt pattern on a flanged joint violates ASME PCC-1 bolting requirements and B16.5 flange assembly practice. It prevents uniform gasket compression, creating a high risk of leakage, joint failure, and code non-compliance. Because the work is rough-complete and the joint is defective/non-compliant, it must fail until corrected.", "references": ["ASME PCC-1", "B16.5"]}
